chapters.title: Introduction to Microwaves
chapters.content: Hello student! Today we learn about Microwaves. Microwaves are a type of electromagnetic wave with frequency between 1 GHz and 300 GHz.

chapters.title: Microwave Transmission Lines
chapters.content: Transmission lines carry microwave signals from one point to another with minimal loss.

chapters.title: Microwave Components
chapters.content: Microwave components help direct, split, or block microwave signals.

chapters.title: Microwave Antennas
chapters.content: Antennas convert microwave signals between electrical currents and electromagnetic waves.

chapters.title: Microwave Applications
chapters.content: Microwaves are used in many everyday and industrial applications.
